race.comment: BRUDENELL (5) defied his big price ($71), when he covered a stack of ground in the run for a desperately unlucky nose second over 1100m in the LR Ortensia Stakes at Scone second-up. Gets the gun run today and a repeat performance can see him go one better. WANARUAH (16) progressive entire placed at Group level. His two runs back have been outstanding over this trip in BM78 class and looks up to this contest with just the 54kg. Can get over from the draw and figure prominently. HARRY'S BAR (13) stalked the speed and had the race in her keeping inside the 150m with a well-deserved victory over 1200m in the Wagga Town Plate. Drawn to stalk the leaders and hard to ignore in this form. CHIDIAC (7) kept fresh and has good credentials over this trip after winning in Group 3 grade last start. GENERAL SALUTE (3) is one of the class runners of the race resuming. Track suits after the one good trial win. Place best.
